_comment: Golden scenario for the SCD2 strategy reference (plugins/strategy/scd2-py) — the SECOND strategy implementation (ADR-003). Unlike a per-axis golden vector (one axis, one pass), this is a two-RUN temporal scenario: run1 is the initial load of a customer dimension; run2 is the next day's snapshot with one CHANGED row (id=1 region west→north), one UNCHANGED (id=2), and one NEW (id=3). After both runs the SCD2 history must equal expected_history — id=1 has a closed old version + a new current version; id=2 stays one current version; id=3 is one new current version. The strategy is exercised over the REAL composition stack (gateway + format + catalog + Arrow Flight) by plugins/composition/harness.py's SCD2 phase. Run together with fullrefresh, these are the two independent strategy references that let strategy/v1 freeze.
